title: schedonorus serotinus
intro: Schedonorus serotinus, also known as Timothy grass, is a perennial grass species commonly found in meadows and pastures. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Schedonorus serotinus include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Timothy grass can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
